summary: Newly refurbished apartment located just moments from Angel station and the many amenities of Upper Street and Clerkenwell.
feesApplyText:
TENANCY INFORMATION

Client money protection (CMP) provided by PropertyMark.
Ombudsman services provided by the Property Redress Scheme

Rules for how fees will be charged for Housing Act Tenancies are different to how fees will be charged for Non-Housing Act Tenancies (NHA). All our fees and charges are shown including VAT.

HOUSING ACT TENANCIES

Holding deposit Equivalent of one weeks rent.

Changing tenancy documents once signed £50, or any reasonable costs incurred if these are higher than £50. This will include but is not limited to where you request to vary the terms of the tenancy agreement, request consent for a pet, or where one or more tenant wishes to be released from their contract by finding a replacement tenant, an additional tenant added or a tenant removed.

Deposit: annual rent less than £50,000 Equivalent to five weeks' rent / annual rent £50,000 or more Equivalent to six weeks' rent

Early termination (at landlord s discretion) All costs incurred by the landlord for allowing early termination including the agent's existing or re-letting fees

Stamp Duty Land Tax Payable on tenancies where the rent exceeds £125,000

Late, unpaid, returned rent payments 3% above the base rate of Bank of England per annum, calculated daily

Lost keys Any cost for the replacement of keys, fobs, security devices or associated items

NON-HOUSING ACT TENANCIES (NHA)

Tenancy Agreement Fee: £360

Reference checks: £60 per reference

Deposit Usually equivalent to six weeks rent.

Right to Rent: £30 per person per check (as required)

Check-in and/or out from £120 to £500 approx. depending on the size of the property. Check your tenancy agreement to confirm who is responsible for paying this charge

Late/unpaid/returned rent payments: £30 per week late payment charge and 3% above the base rate of Bank of England per annum, calculated daily

Tenant Swap: £420 administration fee + references

Renewal: £210 for each renewal.

Changing tenancy documents once signed: £150

Early termination (at landlord s discretion) All costs incurred by the landlord for allowing early termination including the agent's existing or re-letting fees

Stamp Duty Land Tax payable on tenancies where the rent exceeds £125,000

keyFeatures.description: Angel and Upper Street are a short walk away, as is Exmouth Market with its wide range of restaurants and bars including firm local favourite Moro.
